name: Plastic Expandable Utensil Drawer Organizer Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Showcase your modern organization style by keeping the utensils sorted and neatly separated with the Plastic Expandable Utensil Drawer Organizer from Brightroom™. This drawer organizer comes with multiple compartments to give you enough space for forks, spoons, knives and more. Made of plastic, it has an expandable design to meet your organization needs and fits nicely in a drawer.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
